title: Federal Reserve Board - 2023 Press Releases
summary: This is an annual index page listing Federal Reserve Board press releases from calendar year 2023. The page contains dozens of disparate announcements including enforcement actions, banking applications, regulatory proposals, committee appointments, and FOMC/discount rate meeting minutes. Most items relate to regulatory and supervisory matters rather than direct macro catalysts or market structure. The source is not a single archiveable document but rather a chronological archive index requiring individual item review.
key_points: The source is a listing/index page, not a single document, containing approximately 60+ separate press releases from 2023
FOMC minutes referenced include meetings from July 25-26, September 19-20, and October 31-November 1, 2023
Discount rate meeting minutes were released for multiple periods in 2023
A survey of senior financial officers regarding reserve balance management strategies was published (August 1 and December 15)
Reserve requirement exemption amount and low reserve tranche were indexed for 2024 (November 27)
Most items are enforcement actions, banking applications, and regulatory policy updates (CRA, debt requirements, appraisal thresholds)
why_it_matters: This index page aggregates Federal Reserve communications but is too broad for direct use in RAG applications. Researchers seeking macro catalyst or market structure information must identify and access individual press releases from this archive. The FOMC minutes and reserve balance survey contain potentially relevant information but require separate extraction.
market_structure_context: Reserve balance management survey results published August 1 and December 15, 2023 may contain relevant information on bank reserve strategies but require individual document review.
